calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-12-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
Plaintiff: Tony E. Masarweh, present in pro per as Trustee for the Masarweh Revocalbe Trust dated June 26, 2002, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Eileen Smith.
Exhibit 1 - Three-Day Notice to pay of quit-----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Proof of Service--------------------------------------ID/EVID
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 2420 Van Ness Ave., #18, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $1,269.32
Costs $152.00, for a Total of $2,211.32
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Plaintiff stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.
